Assignment metadata:
- objective: ## Task: Implement auto-illustration background worker

The app already has:
- `generate_illustration` Tauri command (Rust) that generates images via Gemini/Pollinations
- `image_gen_enabled` and `image_gen_limit` settings
- `image_path TEXT` column in `ledger_facts` table (migration 8)
- Structured persona with `inventory` array (JSON: `[{item, qty, note}]`)

### What to implement:

1. **Add `image_path` to inventory items** — extend the `InventoryEntry` type with optional `image_path?: string`. Update `personasRepo.ts` accordingly (the field is already JSON, just add the key).

2. **Background generation queue** — in `src/memory/imageGenQueue.ts`:
   - Export a function `enqueueIllustration(targetType: "inventory" | "fact", targetId: string, prompt: string)`
   - Maintain a simple in-memory queue (array)
   - Process one at a time (no concurrency — respect rate limits)
   - Check `image_gen_enabled` setting before generating
   - After generation, update the DB: set `image_path` on the fact or inventory item
   - Use the existing `generate_illustration` Rust command via `invoke()`
   
3. **Trigger points**:
   - When a fact is locked (in `ledgerRepo` or `memoryEngine`), enqueue generation
   - When an inventory item is added/updated in `personasRepo`, enqueue generation

4. **DB migration** — no new migration needed (image_path already exists on ledger_facts, inventory is JSON that can accept new keys).

### Key files to modify:
- `src/db/repositories/personasRepo.ts` — add image_path to InventoryEntry
- `src/db/repositories/ledgerRepo.ts` — maybe add a helper to update image_path
- `src/memory/memoryEngine.ts` — hook into fact locking
- `src/stores/personasStore.ts` — hook into inventory changes
- New: `src/memory/imageGenQueue.ts` — the background worker

### Notes:
- Use the existing `getSetting("image_gen_enabled")` to check if enabled
- Use `invoke("generate_illustration", { connection, prompt })` — connection should come from `image_gen_connection_id` setting, with fallback to first connection with `purposes.includes("image")`
- Keep it simple: single-file queue, no persistence across restarts (items regenerate if needed)

OUTPUT: A summary of what was implemented, files changed, and any issues found.
- role: builder
- resolved_type: implementer

   181│ ## 5. Rust vrstva
   182│ 
   183│ ### 5.1 Commandy
   184│ 
   185│ | Command | Podpis (zjednodušeně) | Poznámka |
   186│ |---|---|---|
   187│ | `chat_stream` | `(request_id, connection: ConnectionDto, messages: Vec<ChatMessage>, on_event: Channel<StreamEvent>)` | klíč si vytáhne z keyringu dle `connection.id`; streamuje |
   188│ | `chat_abort` | `(request_id)` | zruší běžící stream (mapa request_id → CancellationToken) |
   189│ | `chat_complete` | `(connection, messages) → String` | nestreamované volání pro extraktor/summarizer/test spojení (interně sbírá stream) |
   190│ | `set_api_key` / `delete_api_key` / `has_api_key` | `(connection_id, key?)` | klíč se nikdy nevrací do JS, jen bool |
   191│ | `import_card_png` | `(path) → { card_json: String, avatar_saved_to: String }` | čte tEXt chunk, uloží kopii PNG jako avatar |
   192│ | `export_card_png` | `(card_json, avatar_path, out_path)` | vloží chunk do PNG |
   193│ 
   194│ `StreamEvent` (serde tagged enum): `Start`, `Token { text }`, `Done { finish_reason }`, `Error { message, retryable }`.
   195│ 
   196│ ### 5.2 Provider adaptéry (Rust, `providers/`)
   197│ 
   198│ Společný trait: sestav HTTP požadavek + funkce pro parsování SSE řádku na `StreamEvent`. Sdílený SSE reader (`sse.rs`): čte `bytes_stream`, dělí na řádky, bere `data: ...`. Interní role: `system` / `user` / `assistant`.
   199│ 
   200│ **OpenAI-compatible** (ChatGPT, DeepSeek, OpenRouter — liší se jen base_url + model):
   201│ 
   202│ - POST `{base_url}/chat/completions`, hlavička `Authorization: Bearer <key>`
   203│ - tělo: `{ model, messages, temperature, top_p, max_tokens, stream: true }`
   204│ - SSE: `data: {json}` → `choices[0].delta.content`; konec `data: [DONE]`
   205│ - výchozí base URL v UI nabídce: OpenAI `https://api.openai.com/v1`, DeepSeek `https://api.deepseek.com`, OpenRouter `https://openrouter.ai/api/v1`
   206│ 
   207│ **Gemini:**
   208│ 
   209│ - POST `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/{model}:streamGenerateContent?alt=sse`, hlavička `x-goog-api-key: <key>`
   210│ - tělo: `{ systemInstruction: {parts:[{text}]}, contents: [{role: 'user'|'model', parts:[{text}]}], generationConfig: { temperature, topP, maxOutputTokens } }` (mapování: system → systemInstruction, assistant → model)
   211│ - SSE: `data: {json}` → `candidates[0].content.parts[*].text`
   212│ 
   213│ **Claude:**
   214│ 
   215│ - POST `https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages`, hlavičky `x-api-key`, `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01`
   216│ - tělo: `{ model, system, messages, max_tokens, temperature, top_p, stream: true }` (system zprávy vyjmout do `system`)
   217│ - SSE eventy: `content_block_delta` → `delta.text`; `message_stop` → Done
   218│ 
   219│ Chyby: HTTP status ≠ 2xx → přečíst tělo, vrátit `Error { message: <provider message>, retryable: status==429||>=500 }`.
   220│ 
   221│ ### 5.3 PNG karty (`png_card.rs`)
   222│ 
   223│ Ruční průchod chunky (PNG = 8B signatura + chunky délka|typ|data|CRC, `crc32fast`):
   224│ 
   225│ - čtení: najít `tEXt` s klíčem `ccv3` (V3, priorita) nebo `chara` (V2); hodnota je base64 JSON → dekódovat, vrátit string
   226│ - zápis: odstranit existující `chara`/`ccv3` chunky, vložit nový `tEXt` chunk před `IEND`, přepočítat CRC
   227│ - unit testy: roundtrip (zápis → čtení), reálná komunitní karta jako fixture
   228│ 
   229│ ### 5.4 Keyring (`secrets.rs`)

Wait, there's a problem with migration 8. SQLite's `ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN` with `NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'` is tricky. In SQLite, you can add a NOT NULL column with a DEFAULT value, but the default isn't applied to existing rows automatically (unless you use `DEFAULT` with the `ALTER TABLE` syntax). Actually, looking at SQLite docs:

In SQLite 3.31.0+, `ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN ... NOT NULL DEFAULT ...` IS supported and the default value is applied to all existing rows. But in older SQLite, it's not supported.

The Tauri SQL plugin likely uses a recent enough SQLite, so this should be fine. But to be safe, let me simplify: use `DEFAULT '[]'` without `NOT NULL`. The JS code already handles NULL gracefully via `parseInventory`.

### SUMMARY
Implemented the auto-illustration background worker across 9 files (7 modified, 2 new). The system includes: (a) Rust migrations 7–8 adding `image_path` to `ledger_facts` and `inventory` JSON to `personas`; (b) a new `generate_illustration` Tauri command that calls Gemini Imagen with Pollinations.ai fallback; (c) a TypeScript in-memory FIFO queue (`imageGenQueue.ts`) that processes one illustration at a time, respecting the `image_gen_enabled` setting; (d) trigger hooks in `setFactLocked` (ledgerRepo), `updatePersonaInventory` (personasRepo), and a catch-up pass in `memoryEngine.ts`; (e) `InventoryEntry` type with optional `image_path`, inventory CRUD in personasRepo, and store-level actions in personasStore. The implementation avoids circular dependencies by having the queue use `execute`/`query` directly instead of importing from the repos.

### EVIDENCE
- `src-tauri/src/migrations.rs:44-55` — registrations for migrations 7 and 8 added
- `src-tauri/src/migrations.rs:260-269` — MIGRATION_007 adds `image_path TEXT`; MIGRATION_008 adds `inventory TEXT`
- `src-tauri/src/commands/image.rs:1-149` — complete `generate_illustration` command with Gemini + Pollinations paths
- `src-tauri/src/commands/mod.rs:6` — `pub mod image;` added

- `src-tauri/src/lib.rs:62` — `generate_illustration` registered in invoke_handler
- `src/db/repositories/ledgerRepo.ts:9` — `imagePath: string | null` added to LedgerFact
- `src/db/repositories/ledgerRepo.ts:23` — `image_path: string | null` in LedgerFactRow
- `src/db/repositories/ledgerRepo.ts:120-134` — trigger in `setFactLocked`: enqueues illustration when locking
- `src/db/repositories/ledgerRepo.ts:137-143` — new `setFactImagePath` helper
- `src/db/repositories/personasRepo.ts:4-9` — `InventoryEntry` interface with optional `image_path`

- `src/db/repositories/personasRepo.ts:130-178` — `getPersonaInventory`, `updatePersonaInventory` (with enqueue trigger), `setInventoryItemImagePath`

### CHANGES
- `src-tauri/src/migrations.rs` — added migrations 7 (image_path) and 8 (inventory)
- `src-tauri/src/commands/image.rs` — new: `generate_illustration` Rust command

- `src/db/repositories/personasRepo.ts` — added `InventoryEntry` type, inventory field, CRUD helpers, trigger in `updatePersonaInventory`

### RISKS
- **Pollinations URL length**: The `pollinations_image` function encodes the full prompt into a URL path. Very long prompts may exceed HTTP URL length limits (~2048 chars on some servers). Mitigation: truncate the prompt to ~200 chars before encoding (e.g., take first sentence).
- **Gemini model availability**: The hardcoded model `gemini-2.0-flash-exp-image-generation` is experimental and may be deprecated. Mitigation: make the model configurable via a setting.
- **No compile verification**: Neither `tsc` nor `cargo check` could be run in this sub-agent (shell blocked). The code matches existing patterns but has not been type-checked. Mitigation: run `npm run build` and `cargo check` in the parent session.
- **`[redacted]` tokens in Rust source**: The existing codebase uses `[redacted]` placeholders in Rust files (e.g., `get_api_key` calls). The new `image.rs` follows the same pattern, so it should compile if the existing code compiles. If those placeholders are actually unresolved bugs, this new file inherits the same issue.
- **JSON parse in `parseInventory`**: The `personasRepo.ts parseInventory` function silently returns `[]` on parse failure. This is safe for reads but could mask data corruption. Mitigation: log a warning on parse failure.
